channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sophie Oluwole: How She Reframed African Philosophy and Yoruba Thought
item.description: Sophie Oluwole (1935-2018) na one Nigerian scholar wey make history as the first woman wey get PhD for philosophy for Nigeria. She no only put Yoruba philosophical traditions for the world map, she al...

item.title: Federal High Court Orders Freezing of Petrocam Accounts Over ₦9.05bn Zenith Bank Debt
item.description: Federal High Court for Lagos don order say make dem freeze all the bank accounts wey connect to Petrocam Trading Nigeria Limited and im oga, Patrick Ilo, because of ₦9.05 billion wey Zenith Bank talk ...

item.title: Understanding Unsafe Abortion Practices Among Young Women in Ghana Despite Legal Access
item.description: Ghana law allow abortion for first trimester when pregnancy fit danger woman life, health, or if e happen due to rape or incest. Medication abortion, using mifepristone and misoprostol pills, dey avai...

item.title: Kganyago says South Africa’s economy is improving but warns key risks remain
item.description: South African Reserve Bank (SARB) Governor Lesetja Kganyago says South Africa’s macroeconomic environment has improved in recent years but cautions that policymakers and businesses should not become c...

item.title: President Approves Extension of NAB Chairman’s Term Amid Parliamentary Controversy
item.description: ISLAMABAD: President Asif Ali Zardari has formally approved the NAB (Amendment) Bill, 2026, which permits the extension of the National Accountability Bureau (NAB) chairman’s tenure by an additional t...

item.title: Growing up South Sudanese Australian: From Street Gangs to Finding Belonging and Identity
item.description: Mar Manasseh Riek, a 20-year-old South Sudanese Australian, shares his personal journey navigating life as the child of refugees in Melbourne. Experiencing racism from a young age, including being exc...

item.title: India defeats England by 7 runs to reach T20 World Cup final against New Zealand
item.description: In a thrilling ICC T20 World Cup 2026 semi-final at Mumbai’s Wankhede Stadium, India defeated England by a narrow margin of 7 runs to advance to the final against New Zealand. Sanju Samson was the sta...

item.title: Seriake Dickson Defects from PDP to Nigeria Democratic Congress
item.description: The Bayelsa West Senator, Seriake Dickson, don waka comot from the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) join the newly registered Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC). Dickson, wey govern Bayelsa State from 20...

item.title: Liberia Anti-Corruption Commission Clears Former NaFAA Director General Emma Glassco of Fraud Allegations Over World Bank Funds
item.description: The Liberia Anti-Corruption Commission (LACC) don officially clear former National Fisheries and Aquaculture Authority (NaFAA) Director General, Emma Glassco, of any wrongdoing or fraud in the use of ...

item.title: Iran continues attacks on Gulf tankers amid escalating conflict
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US and Iran has entered its sixth day, with Iranian forces continuing attacks on oil tankers in the Gulf. This has led to a significant disruption of global air and ma...

item.title: NBI confiscates over P237 million in counterfeit luxury items in Binondo
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has confiscated over P237 million worth of counterfeit luxury goods in Binondo earlier this week. The operations, carried out by the NB...

item.title: OPP Advises Public Not to Approach Cattle That Escaped Near Inglis Lake Road
item.description: Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) in Kenora have issued a public advisory urging people not to hunt or disturb a group of cattle that escaped from a trailer earlier this week. The incident occurred arou...

item.title: Tanzania Assures International Community of Its Ability to Handle Human Rights Issues
item.description: Ambassador Abdallah Possi, Tanzania's Permanent Representative to the UN in Geneva, has assured that Tanzania is capable of handling its own domestic matters, including human rights issues. Speaking d...

item.title: Music Streaming CEO Develops Open-Source Platform to Track Global Conflicts in Real Time
item.description: Elie Habib, CEO of Anghami, a major Middle Eastern music streaming platform, created World Monitor, an open-source dashboard designed to track global conflicts in real time. Initially a side project, ...

item.title: Pakistan Government Rejects Zalmay Khalilzad's Claim of Daesh-K Commander Killed in Punjab
item.description: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting in Pakistan has strongly rejected claims made by former US envoy Zalmay Khalilzad regarding the presence and activity of Daesh-Khorasan (also known as ISKP...

item.title: Tinubu Administration Delays Automatic Employment for 210 Outstanding Ex-NYSC Members Seven Months After Approval
item.description: Over seven months don pass since President Bola Tinubu approve automatic employment, scholarships up to doctorate level, and N250,000 cash award each for 210 ex-NYSC members wey distinguish demself du...

item.title: Bomb threat forces precautionary dismissal of students at Quezon NHS
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Classes at Quezon National High School (QNHS) were disrupted yesterday morning when a bomb threat was posted on the school's social media pages. The threat prompted authorities t...

item.title: Senate Summons Ex-NNPCL Officials Over ₦210 Trillion Audit Queries
item.description: The Nigerian Senate Committee on Public Accounts don yan say dem fit issue arrest warrant against former top officials of the Nigeria National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPCL), including ex-CEO Mele ...

item.title: Two Killed, Four Injured in Parañaque Condominium Shooting Incident
item.description: In Parañaque City, a tragic shooting incident occurred at a condominium basketball court on Wednesday evening, resulting in the deaths of two men and injuries to four others. According to police repor...

item.title: House Committee Orders VP Sara Duterte to Respond to Impeachment Complaints
item.description: The House justice committee has officially directed Vice President Sara Duterte to answer the impeachment complaints filed against her within a 10-day period. If she fails to respond in time, it will ...
